sectiondef.header: EMCY service: object 0x1003 modification using SDO

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Pre-defined Error Field object (0x1003)

detaileddescription.para: When the download indication function for the object 0x1003 is called with a non-zero abort code
Then the same abort code value is returned, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Pre-defined Error Field object (0x1003)

detaileddescription.para: When a value longer than one byte is downloaded to the object 0x1003 using SDO
Then CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN_HI abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Pre-defined Error Field object (0x1003)

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to a sub-object of the object 0x1003 using SDO
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_WRITE abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Pre-defined Error Field object (0x1003)

detaileddescription.para: When a value different than zero is downloaded to the object 0x1003 using SDO
Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Pre-defined Error Field object (0x1003) with multiple errors recorded

detaileddescription.para: When a value equal to zero is downloaded to the object 0x1003 using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, 0 is set in the 0x1003 object, the error stack of the EMCY service is cleared calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_dn() calls co_obj_addressof_val() calls co_obj_get_subidx()

sectiondef.header: EMCY service: object 0x1014 modification using SDO

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014)

detaileddescription.para: When the download indication function for the object 0x1014 is called with a non-zero abort code
Then the same abort code value is returned, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014)

detaileddescription.para: When a value shorter than 4 bytes is downloaded to the object 0x1014 using SDO
Then CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN_LO abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014) with an additional sub-object at a non-zero sub-index set to any value

detaileddescription.para: When the sub-object is changed using SDO
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014)

detaileddescription.para: When same value as already set is downloaded to the object 0x1014 using SDO
Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014) with a valid COB-ID set

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID is downloaded to the object 0x1014 using SDO

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014) with a valid COB-ID set

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with the same CAN-ID is downloaded to the object 0x1014 using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, new COB-ID is set in the object 0x1014 calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014) with a valid COB-ID set

detaileddescription.para: When an invalid COB-ID is downloaded to the object 0x1014 using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, new COB-ID is set in the object 0x1014 calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014) with an invalid COB-ID set

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID is downloaded to the object 0x1014 using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, new COB-ID is set in the object 0x1014 calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014) with an invalid COB-ID set

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID using Extended Identifier but without frame bit set is downloaded to the object 0x1014 using SDO

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the COB-ID EMCY object (0x1014) with an invalid COB-ID set

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID using Extended Identifier and with frame bit set is downloaded to the object 0x1014 using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, new COB-ID is set in the object 0x1014 calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls co_sub_dn()

sectiondef.header: EMCY service: object 0x1028 modification using SDO

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028)

detaileddescription.para: When the download indication function for the object 0x1028 is called with a non-zero abort code
Then the same abort code value is returned, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028) with a consumer COB-ID sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a value shorter than 4 bytes is downloaded to the sub-object using SDO
Then CO_SDO_AC_TYPE_LEN_LO abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028)

detaileddescription.para: When any value is downloaded to the object 0x1028 at sub-index 0x00 using SDO
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_WRITE abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028) with an additional sub-object at a sub-index greater than the number of declared consumer COB-IDs

detaileddescription.para: When the sub-object is changed using SDO

Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028) with more than 127 COB-IDs inserted and with an additional sub-object at a sub-index greater than the number of declared consumer COB-IDs

detaileddescription.para: When the sub-object is changed using SDO

Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028)

detaileddescription.para: When same value as already set is downloaded to the object 0x1028 at any non-zero sub-index using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028) with a valid consumer COB-ID sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID is downloaded to the sub-object using SDO

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028) with a valid consumer COB-ID sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When an invalid COB-ID is downloaded to the sub-object using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, new COB-ID is set in the sub-object calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028) with an invalid consumer COB-ID sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID is downloaded to the sub-object using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, new COB-ID is set in the sub-object calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028) with a valid consumer COB-ID sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with the same CAN-ID is downloaded to the sub-object using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, new COB-ID is set in the sub-object calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028) with an invalid consumer COB-ID sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID using Extended Identifier but without frame bit set is downloaded to the sub-object using SDO

Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_VAL abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, nothing is changed calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to started EMCY service (co_emcy_t), the object dictionary contains the Emergency Consumer Object (0x1028) with an invalid consumer COB-ID sub-object

detaileddescription.para: When a valid COB-ID with a different CAN-ID using Extended Identifier and with frame bit set is downloaded to the sub-object using SDO

Then a zero abort code is passed to CSDO download confirmation function, new COB-ID is set in the sub-object calls co_sub_get_type() calls co_sdo_req_dn_val() calls co_sub_get_subidx() calls co_sub_get_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_sub_get_val_u32() calls can_recv_stop() calls co_sub_dn()

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen Library Unit Test Suite.
